mapper.select: SELECT * FROM( SELECT ROW_NUMBER()OVER(PARTITION BY OBJ.SBJCT_ID , OBJ.USER_ID ORDER BY OBJ.REG_DTTM DESC) AS RN , OBJ.MRK_OBJCT_APLY_ID , DEPT.DEPTNM , USR.USER_ID , USR.STDNT_NO , USR.USERNM , STD.SCYR , OBJ.OBJCT_APLY_CTS , OBJ.CHGBFR_SCR , OBJ.CHGAFT_SCR , OBJ.OBJCT_APLY_STSCD , CD.CDNM AS OBJCT_APLY_STS , FN_REF_FILE_CNT(OBJ.MRK_OBJCT_APLY_ID) AS FILE_CNT FROM TB_LMS_MRK_OBJCT_APLY OBJ JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJ ON OBJ.SBJCT_ID = SBJ.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT DEPT ON SBJ.DEPT_ID = DEPT.DEPT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON OBJ.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC STD ON SBJ.SBJCT_ID = STD.SBJCT_ID AND USR.USER_ID = STD.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD CD ON CD.UP_CD = 'OBJCT_APLY_STSCD' AND OBJ.OBJCT_APLY_STSCD = CD.CD WHERE 1=1 AND OBJ.USER_ID = #{userId} AND OBJ.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} )X WHERE RN = 1

WITH MRK_RANK_INFO AS ( SELECT STD.USER_ID , MRK.SBJCT_ID , MRK.ADTN_SCR , MRK.LST_SCR , DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY MRK.LST_SCR DESC) AS RANK FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC STD LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MRK_SBJCT MRK ON STD.SBJCT_ID = MRK.SBJCT_ID AND STD.USER_ID = MRK.USER_ID WHERE STD.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} ) SELECT X.* , RANK.ADTN_SCR , RANK.LST_SCR , RANK."RANK" FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER()OVER(PARTITION BY OBJ.SBJCT_ID, OBJ.USER_ID ORDER BY OBJ.REG_DTTM DESC) AS NO , OBJ.MRK_OBJCT_APLY_ID , DEPT.DEPTNM , SBJ.SBJCT_ID , USR.USER_ID , USR.STDNT_NO , USR.USERNM , STD.SCYR , OBJ.CHGBFR_SCR , OBJ.CHGAFT_SCR , OBJ.OBJCT_APLY_STSCD , CD.CDNM , OBJ.REG_DTTM FROM TB_LMS_MRK_OBJCT_APLY OBJ JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJ ON OBJ.SBJCT_ID = SBJ.SBJCT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT DEPT ON SBJ.DEPT_ID = DEPT.DEPT_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER USR ON OBJ.USER_ID = USR.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC STD ON SBJ.SBJCT_ID = STD.SBJCT_ID AND USR.USER_ID = STD.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_CMMN_CD CD ON CD.UP_CD = 'OBJCT_APLY_STSCD' AND OBJ.OBJCT_APLY_STSCD = CD.CD )X JOIN MRK_RANK_INFO RANK ON X.USER_ID = RANK.USER_ID AND X.SBJCT_ID = RANK.SBJCT_ID WHERE X.NO = 1 ORDER BY X.REG_DTTM DESC
